options.command: npx tsx -e "import { langgraphDeploymentRuntimePythonModule } from './src/index.ts'; const module = langgraphDeploymentRuntimePythonModule; if (module.id !== 'langgraph-deployment-runtime-python' || module.title !== 'LangGraph Deployment Runtime (Python)') { throw new Error('Unexpected module shape for ' + module.id); }"
npx tsx -e "const token = process.env.COCKPIT_SECRET_TOKEN; if (!token) { throw new Error('Missing COCKPIT_SECRET_TOKEN'); } console.log('secret-gated integration ready');"
